I build mobile apps that help people learn and grow. Currently focused on language learning apps and productivity tools.

My Apps 🚀

Here are the mobile apps I've built to help people learn, grow, and be more productive.

📚

Verbly - Learn Hebrew

Free

Master Hebrew Verbs One Day at a Time! Learn essential Hebrew verbs daily with an intuitive and stress-free approach. Features daily verbs, flashcards, progress tracking, and offline learning.

Education
⭐ 5

1K+ downloads
